We were with my dad, we were at his farm, we'd ridden horses, we'd enjoyed a fire. We just had had just a perfect day. Couldn't have drawn it up any better.<|15.70|><|endoftext|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> And after a day at the farm, we went to this particular bar that we always go to.<|5.64|> <|6.70|> Everything was great.
